query: UPDATE gallery_images SET image_url = CONCAT('https://picsum.photos/id/', (id + 100), '/600/400') LIMIT 35;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user reQhEQm8VKDhmxs.root --database TPXNrRKBQNE8qaxNyKenmM --execute UPDATE gallery_images SET image_url = CONCAT('https://picsum.photos/id/', (id + 100), '/600/400') LIMIT 35;
